use_cases: Triggering actions and form submissions with multiple visual variants
Navigation and link-like interactions via ghost and link variants
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
Destructive action confirmations with the destructive variant
Accessible focus states for keyboard navigation
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component with Radix UI Slot integration and CVA-powered variant system. Supports six variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features focus-visible ring states, disabled states, and asChild prop for polymorphic composition. Standard utility button used throughout UI systems for triggering actions.
